compiled_state.title: [test-batched.sh]: --filter flag does not exist -> unknown option error on first use
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
Attempted to run targeted tests using test-batched.sh --runner=bash --test-dir=tests/scripts --filter=<pattern>. The --filter flag does not exist in test-batched.sh, producing ERROR: Unknown option: --filter=...

## Expected Behavior
test-batched.sh supports a --filter flag to run a subset of test files matching a pattern, similar to pytest -k.

## Actual Behavior
ERROR: Unknown option: --filter=... — must fall back to running individual test files directly (bash tests/scripts/test-foo.sh).
